title: Senior Advocate Surojit Nath Mitra appointed new Advocate General of West Bengal
description: Senior Advocate Surojit Nath Mitra has been appointed as the new Advocate General (AG) for the State of West Bengal.A notification for his appointment was issued today.Earlier, Senior Advocate Kishore Datta had resigned from the post after the All India Trinamool Congress lost the State Assembly elections to the BJP.Mitra has been in legal practice since March 1983. He studied law and economics at University of Calcutta between 1978 and 1982 and practices in the areas of civil and commercial law
